armors.the_deep_void.all_seeing.when_tar: When an entity targets the wearer:
armors.the_deep_void.all_seeing.worn: Any player around the wearer will glow and the wearer will receive strength
armors.the_deep_void.crawler.worn4: Eating Bone Mush or any other food made from it gives Regeneration I
armors.the_deep_void.fly_wings.on_key_pr: Fly in straight lines for a short period of time
armors.the_deep_void.grim_lavendite.atta: Deflects any projectile back at the shooter
armors.the_deep_void.grim_rotten_bone.wh: When in darkness or when under the effects of Rotten Heart:
armors.the_deep_void.hard_flesh.attacked: Resistance increases at the cost of speed
armors.the_deep_void.hard_flesh.on_key_p: Unleashes a devastating roar that damages foes in an area
armors.the_deep_void.harvest_mask.attack: Removes Hexed from the foe, dealing more damage than if the effect ends naturally. If the victim has more health than the amount of Absorption of the wearer, the removed Hexed transforms into Absorption with the level based on the damage build up of Hexed. The Absorption has no limits, but is temporary
armors.the_deep_void.harvest_mask.kill: Transforms their soul into a lethal projectile that targets nearby victims and inflicts Hexed III
armors.the_deep_void.harvest_mask.when_a: Upon attacking a foe with Hexed bare-handed or while crouching:
armors.the_deep_void.harvest_mask.worn: The wearer is immune to Hexed
armors.the_deep_void.hunter.on_jumping: The wearer will perform a double jump
armors.the_deep_void.hunter.on_key_press: Sends out a chilling scream, giving Strength I
armors.the_deep_void.hunter.on_sprinting: Increases movement speed. Any entity in front of the wearer will be pushed back upon colliding, dealing damage
armors.the_deep_void.hunter.step_height: The wearer can step up one block
armors.the_deep_void.onyx.in_darkness1: Attacks get repeated with half the damage
armors.the_deep_void.onyx.in_darkness2: Allows the wearer to see in darkness
armors.the_deep_void.plague.death1: Has a chance to save the wearer from death at the cost of durability
armors.the_deep_void.plague.worn1: Lessens the effects of Ambrosia Withdrawal
armors.the_deep_void.plague.worn2: Any enemy inflicted with Rot, Poison or Wither around the wearer will also be inflicted with Plague
armors.the_deep_void.plague.worn3: When in the presence of a plagued enemy, the wearer will slowly heal wounds
armors.the_deep_void.rib_cage.worn2: Grants immunity to Poison, Nausea and Blossoming
armors.the_deep_void.rib_cage.worn3: Teeth will not damage the wearer, teeth trap will not activate and pus sacks will not explode
armors.the_deep_void.rotten_bone.on_key_: Makes the wearer invisible. When in this state, speed is increased. Upon attacking a foe, the effect ends and double damage is dealt
armors.the_deep_void.soul_voidrium.in_da: Attacks get repeated with more damage
armors.the_deep_void.soul_voidrium.on_ke: Teleports the wearer, damaging the very soul of victims they pass through, applying Hexed I
armors.the_deep_void.soul_wings.on_key_p: Sneak while flying to fly straight upwards
armors.the_deep_void.void_cloak.on_key_p: Allows the wearer to phase through walls
armors.the_deep_void.voidrium.in_darknes: Attacks get repeated with half the damage
armors.the_deep_void.voidrium_chestplate: The wearer is granted Resistance and Strength
armors.the_deep_void.weaver.descr: Slowly withers away the soul of nearby victims
armors.the_deep_void.weaver_boots.on_gra: Allows the wearer to walk on air
armors.the_deep_void.weaver_leggings.att: The wearer has a chance to dodge the attack
armors.the_deep_void.weaver_mask.kill: If the victim has more health than the wearer, the wearer's health is enhanced until death or until the mask is removed. This has a limit and when reached, or the victim has less health, the wearer will instead get Strength and Speed temporarily
armors.the_deep_void.weaver_mask.worn2: The wearer can no longer heal naturally; only Regeneration, Instant Health and Golden Blood can heal health
armors.the_deep_void.weaver_robe.attack: Each 6 hits, the wearer is teleported behind the foe
block.the_deep_void.ferryman_lantern.des: §7The creatures are not interested in breaking this lantern, but are not scared of it
block.the_deep_void.head_of_the_hunter.d: §7Deters any Masked Hunter in the area
block.the_deep_void.head_of_the_primordi: Head Of The Primordial Bone Crawler
block.the_deep_void.voidrium_glass.descr: §7Stops any Player that is not the owner from breaking blocks, except the glass, in a radius when on top of a beacon in an open space
death.attack.eldritch_void.item: %1$s was absorbed by the void, courtesy of %2$s, using %3$s
death.attack.eldritch_void.player: %1$s was absorbed by the void whilst trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.suicide.player: %1$s blew their brains out whilst trying to escape %2$s
death.attack.void_sickness.player: %1$s was consumed by the void whilst trying to escape %2$s
effect.the_deep_void.weaver_curse.warn: A force is preventing you from breaking that block.
enchantment.the_deep_void.bait.desc: Increases the chance of catching creatures while fishing in the Deep Void
enchantment.the_deep_void.bone_walker.de: Increases movement speed on bone blocks.
Increases the chance of catching crates while fishing in the Deep Void
enchantment.the_deep_void.curse_of_gods_: Curses the wearer with permanent ambrosia withdrawal
enchantment.the_deep_void.curse_of_sorro: Cursed items give the effect Dead Inside.
enchantment.the_deep_void.radiance.desc: Increases damage against voidling mobs such as Void Tentacles and Bog Walkers.
enchantment.the_deep_void.scourge_of_fle: Increases damage against fleshkin mobs such as Devourers and Spore Spewers.
enchantment.the_deep_void.void_vision.de: Highlights mobs when looking through the spyglass.
gamerule.giveWikiBook: Give Book Of Ancient Knowledge On Start
gamerule.giveWikiBook.description: A book that leads to the wiki, given when a player enters the world for the first time
gamerule.spawnHoleStructure.description: A structure that generates at 0, -64, 0 with a hole in the bedrock
item.the_deep_void.all_seeing_sword.desc: §7Right click on an entity to pass your pain onto them, sacrificing your health based on a quarter of your opponent's current health and some durability. §7Each hit makes the sword swing faster
item.the_deep_void.animosity.descr: §7The first hit on an entity deals 2x damage, 2.5x for players. This resets if the player dies. §7Deals 1.5x more damage to players. §7Hides the name of both the killer and the victim. §7Right clicking will transform the sword into a fake diamond sword
item.the_deep_void.animosity_hidden.desc: §cThis form of Animosity does not deal extra damage. §7Right clicking will transform the sword back into Animosity
item.the_deep_void.apostasy.descr: §7Right click to shoot a Soul-Fused Blood Shot, which goes in a straight line and pierces. On hit, applies Hexed. §7When the chamber is full, the bullet will split into 5 slower fragments as well as the main bullet. §7When the chamber is empty, right click to sacrifice 50% of current health to create new bullets
item.the_deep_void.arrow_of_ichor_pellet: §7Shoots 1-5 ichor pellets when using a bow or a crossbow while in the main-hand or the off-hand
item.the_deep_void.arrow_of_spite.descr: §7Shoots 1-3 spiteful arrows when using a bow or a crossbow while in the main-hand or the off-hand
item.the_deep_void.bismuth_flare.desc: Applies Experienced to nearby targets, increasing experience gain from killing affected entities
item.the_deep_void.blood_bow.descr: §7Shoots three blood spikes in a straight line at full charge
item.the_deep_void.bloodthirsty_claws.de: Deals more damage the lower the victim's health is
item.the_deep_void.bone_scythe.desc: Right click to do a wide slash
item.the_deep_void.bright_flare.desc: Weakens the Stalker on direct hit
item.the_deep_void.call_upon_the_hive.de: §7Calls upon the Hive to transport you to a safer location
§9Upon right clicking a block while sneaking
§7If the block is a type of bone block, set a destination for transportation
§7If the block below the user is a type of bone block, get transported to the set destination, leaving a swarm of baby bone crawlers behind and blinding pursuers
item.the_deep_void.call_upon_the_hive.to: §7§lThe Hive cannot transport you that far
item.the_deep_void.chained_weaver_spawn_: Chained Weaver Of Souls Spawn Egg
item.the_deep_void.claw_blade.descr: §7Deals more damage to rotting foes, applying one more level of rot each hit. §7Hitting a poisoned foe will spread the poison
item.the_deep_void.cleansing_stone.desc3: §2Removes any weapon modifiers & gives experience back
item.the_deep_void.cruel_stiletto.descr: §7Sends foes flying, giving speed to the wielder
item.the_deep_void.devourer_shield.descr: §7Brings all foes near the wielder when held up
item.the_deep_void.eldritch_maw.descr: §7Shoots 6 highly inaccurate Void Pellets, which inflict Abyssal Mark. Each pellet increases the severity of Abyssal Mark. At the end of the effect, the victim bursts into void, dealing damage. Sacrifice 8 health to create new pellets
item.the_deep_void.eye_of_the_watcher_sp: Eye Of The Watcher Spawn Egg
item.the_deep_void.eye_shield.descr: §7Paralizes every foe in front of the wielder when blocking an attack
item.the_deep_void.eyekin_saddle.descr2: §7Press the 'Mount Fly' key to fly with the Eyekin
item.the_deep_void.eyekin_saddle.descr3: §7Right click on an Eyekin to despawn it
item.the_deep_void.eyekin_saddle.descr4: §7Press the 'Mount Dash' key to fly faster with the Eyekin
item.the_deep_void.flesh_glove.descr: §7Inflicts Laceration on hit, increasing the damage dealt each hit
item.the_deep_void.flesh_parasite.descr: §7Upon hitting an entity, turn them into a host for the parasite. Upon death, get reborn by the parasite
item.the_deep_void.forbidden_tome.descr: §7Flings shadow daggers out of your enemies, dealing damage. The daggers home onto the nearest foe, healing the caster
item.the_deep_void.giant_bone_crawler_eg: Giant Bone Crawler Egg Spawn Egg
item.the_deep_void.golden_flare.desc: Deals more damage than other flares
item.the_deep_void.goo_sword.descr: §7Rotting foes get poisoned with Poison II
item.the_deep_void.grim_licker_hook.desc: §7Throw a hook that attacks entities it is attached to
item.the_deep_void.grim_scythe.descr: §7Hitting an enemy will also deal damage to any nearby entity. Right click to reap the souls of victims. Upon reaping 10 souls, right click to deal a devastating slash. Hitting enemies will increase the damage dealt by the slash
item.the_deep_void.hard_flesh_sword.desc: §7Steals the life force of foes, healing the wielder based on the damage dealt
item.the_deep_void.heresy.descr: §7Right click to shoot a Blood Shot, which goes in a straight line and pierces. On hit, applies Blood Boil. §7When the chamber is full, the bullet will split into 5 slower fragments as well as the main bullet. §7Sneak to fire all 7 bullets at once with higher damage, but with less range and pierce. Shooting all bullets at once uses 45% of current health when reloading. §7When the chamber is empty, right click to sacrifice 30% of current health and create new bullets. §7If, when reloading, the shooter has Absorption, Golden Blood Shots will be created instead. They shoot further, but with less damage
item.the_deep_void.hexed_doll.descr1: §9-Right click on a Soul Container to summon the Weaver Of Souls
item.the_deep_void.hexed_doll.descr2: §9-Right click on a Soul Forge to summon the Apostle Of Catastrophe, breaking the Soul Forge in the process
item.the_deep_void.hunter_claws.desc: §7Deals more damage to foes inflicted with Rot. Right click to teleport behind foes. Can be dual wielded
item.the_deep_void.ichor_sword.descr: §7Spews out ichor from foes, burning them with the blood of the gods
item.the_deep_void.judgement.descr: §7Executes entities in front of the wielder if their health is below 20% or 7% if their health is above 200. §7Right click to teleport dash, dealing damage to foes in the wielder's path. §7Deals half of the damage to nearby foes when swinging the sword at full charge
item.the_deep_void.knife_bandolier.descr: §7While in the main-hand, knives will appear in the bandolier. At full charge, right click to spin and damage foes in an AOE
item.the_deep_void.knife_glove.descr: §7After hitting an entity, right click to throw multiple knives, which inflict either Poison II or Rot I, in random directions. §7Right click while sneaking to perform a backwards jump
item.the_deep_void.lavendite_shield.desc: §7Flings attackers into the air when blocking
item.the_deep_void.licker_hook.descr4: §7Use the hook if it hits a block
item.the_deep_void.licker_hook.descr6: §7If attached to the hook, retrieve the hook
item.the_deep_void.mimic_doll.descr1: §9-Right click on a Soul Container to summon the Elder Mimic
item.the_deep_void.misanthropy.descr: §7Right click to shoot Ichor inaccurately. On hit, applies Ichor Burn. §7When the chamber is empty, right click to sacrifice some health and create new bullets
item.the_deep_void.misted_heart.descr2: §7Copy a random item from one of the armor slots or the main/off-hand of that entity if they are below 15% of their max health. Cannot copy containers.
item.the_deep_void.necronomicon.descr: §7Summons hive fangs to devour your foes
item.the_deep_void.nerves_of_steel.descr: §7When shot at the right moment, the bow will deal heavy damage
item.the_deep_void.off_hand_void_dagger_: §7Right click with the dagger to attack. Deals more damage after attacking with the dagger in the main-hand. §7Inflicts rot on hit (right click)
item.the_deep_void.onyx_needle.descr2: §7Stab yourself to get the Pain Killer effect
item.the_deep_void.peril.desc: Right click to shoot a bullet made of blood and void that pierces. Right click while sneaking to point the gun to your head. If the user survives, adrenaline will increase by one. Adrenaline increases the damage dealt by the gun
item.the_deep_void.plaguebringer.desc: Right click to do four wide slashes forwards. Any entity caught in those slashes will receive Plague I. If the entity already has Plague, health will instead be given to the wielder. Hitting foes will increase the level of Plague by one, but decrease its duration
item.the_deep_void.reinforced_pickaxe.de: §7Can crack Bedrock and mine Voidrium Ore
item.the_deep_void.rotten_sickle.descr: §7On each swing of the sickle, dash towards the nearest foe
item.the_deep_void.rotten_tongue.descr: §7Deals more damage the closer to death the wielder is
item.the_deep_void.rusty_claws.descr: §7Applies broken armor on targets. Deals more damage when the target is not inflicted with broken armor
item.the_deep_void.sentient_chainsaw.des: §7Right click on an entity to saw them, dealing continuous damage that ignores armor, slowing them down and boiling their blood. §7Right click on a log to break it quickly
item.the_deep_void.shadestorm.descr: §7Fires a flury of arrows that apply Combo to foes. §7Upon fully charging the bow, fire a huge arrow that deals extra damage in an AOE if the target has the effect Combo
item.the_deep_void.sharpshooter.desc: §7Deals more damage the further away the target is
item.the_deep_void.smithing_template_gri: §2Enhanced resistance in darkness / Attacks inflict Rot I / Reflects projectiles back at the shooter
item.the_deep_void.smithing_template_rot: §9Put in Off Hand and right click to apply the template to modded swords in the Main Hand
item.the_deep_void.soul_cleaver.descr: §7Right click on an entity to pass your pain onto them, sacrificing your health based on a fifth of your opponent's current health. §7Each hit makes the sword swing faster. §7The Painful effect spreads to nearby targets when the victim dies
item.the_deep_void.stalker_treat.click: §7Deters the Stalker and stops it from coming for a short period of time
item.the_deep_void.stalker_treat.sneak: §7Throws the treat to distract the Stalker
item.the_deep_void.sulfur_flare.desc: Gives sulfur poisoning to nearby targets and explodes on impact
item.the_deep_void.the_catcher.descr: §7Right click to latch onto the nearest foe, dealing more damage
item.the_deep_void.the_harvest.descr: §7Hitting a foe with the scythe will create a soul slash, damaging any nearby foe and giving them the Hexed effect. §7When attacking a foe that has Hexed, one more level will be added as well as two additional seconds. Additionally, their soul will be reaped. At 5 souls, consume the souls to release a soul slash
item.the_deep_void.tombstone.descr: §7A tombstone with a 3 hit combo. When the wielder successfully performs the combo, all entities around the target including itself will be inflicted with Doom. §7When a victim is Doomed, a tombstone will fall on their head, dealing damage that ignores armor. §7The Tombstone needs to be fully charged in order to deal damage
§7Throw a hook that attacks entities it is attached to, applying Hexed to all entities around the hook
§7The hook will attach to the closest entity
item.the_deep_void.void_dagger.descr: §7Puts a second dagger in the wielder's off-hand. §7Inflicts Wither on hit
item.the_deep_void.void_matter_greatswor: §7When swung, the weight of the sword makes the wielder move forwards, dealing damage in an AOE. Applies rot on hit
item.the_deep_void.void_matter_scythe.de: §7Right click to do a wide slash. Hitting enemies will increase the damage dealt by the slash. Applies rot on hit
item.the_deep_void.void_mirror.descr2: §7If in the Deep Void: teleports you back to the Overworld
item.the_deep_void.void_mirror.descr3: §7If in any other dimension: teleports you to the Deep Void
item.the_deep_void.void_pendant.core: The Void Core is missing and/or is in another dimension.
item.the_deep_void.void_sickle.desc: §7On each swing of the sickle, teleport behind the nearest foe
item.the_deep_void.voidrium_bulwark.desc: §7Enemies that hit the shield take damage. §7Right click at the right moment to parry an attack, gaining Strength II for a short time and stunning foes
item.the_deep_void.voodoo_doll.descr: §7While using the doll, the souls of victims in front of the caster will be slowly drained, damaging them and concentrating them at a point. §7When enough souls are collected, release an explosion at a point, applying Hexed IV to any nearby entities. §7If the Player stops using the doll when there are not enough souls, regeneration will instead be given to the Player depending on how many souls were collected so far
item.the_deep_void.weaver_boots_boots: Boots Of The Weaver Of Souls
item.the_deep_void.weaver_leggings_leggi: Leggings Of The Weaver Of Souls
item.the_deep_void.weaver_mask_helmet: Mask Of The Weaver Of Souls
item.the_deep_void.weaver_robe_chestplat: Robe Of The Weaver Of Souls
jei.the_deep_void.blood_bow_info:
5% chance from Flesh Crates.
8% chance from Golden Flesh Crates.

Crates can be caught while fishing in the Deep Void.
Flesh Crates can be caught in Flesh biomes.
jei.the_deep_void.bone_crawler_chitin_in: Can be gotten by growing a tamed Bone Crawler hatched from an egg with the hatching enzyme.
jei.the_deep_void.bone_crawler_egg_info:
Can be hatched by right clicking with hatching enzyme.
Feeding a Baby Bone Crawler 64 bones will make it grow into a Bone Crawler.
Feeding a Bone Crawler 128 goo balls will make it grow into a Mother Bone Crawler.
Feeding a Bone Crawler 128 rotten bones will make it grow into an Alpha Bone Crawler.
Feed the Crawlers bones to turn them into goo balls and heal the crawler.
jei.the_deep_void.boss_head_and_disc_inf: Drops from their respective bosses upon defeating them without receiving a single point of damage
jei.the_deep_void.flesh_parasite_info:
5% chance from Flesh Crates.
10% chance from Golden Flesh Crates.

Crates can be caught while fishing in the Deep Void.
Flesh Crates can be caught in Flesh biomes.
jei.the_deep_void.fly_wing_piece_info: Drops when maggots grow into void flies. To grow maggots, feed them rotten flesh/flesh blocks/spider eyes
jei.the_deep_void.glutton_block_jei_info:
The Glutton Block can be fed food, soil and minerals and spits out items depending on the quality of what is fed to it.
It can be fed by right-clicking on the block or through hoppers.
jei.the_deep_void.pustulent_flesh_block_: Pustulent Flesh Blocks can be turned into regular Flesh Blocks by the preserver.
jei.the_deep_void.rotten_tongue_info:
5% chance from Rotten Crates.
8% chance from Golden Rotten Crates.

Crates can be caught while fishing in the Deep Void.
Rotten Crates can be caught in most biomes, except the Crawler Nest and the Flesh biomes.
jei.the_deep_void.solid_ambrosia_info:
Right click with a glass bottle to fill it with ichor.
When placed on top of a flesh block, solid ambrosia will refill overtime.
jei.the_deep_void.soul_forge_jei_info:
The soul forge allows the crafting of soul-fused ingots. It is placed after defeating the apostle of catastrophe.
It cannot be moved or mined.

text.the_deep_void.apostle.blessing_line: §cThe flesh is consuming, the soul is transforming.
§cYou.. cannot.. trusted, cannot allow.. to live.
§cA choice is upon us: die by the plague or transform, ''ascend'' into something unrecognizable, something far from human.
§cThis cage has been keeping me together, keeping my mind in one piece.
§cEach passing moment, I feel it slowly slipping away.
§cAnd you, you do not seem affected by this plague.
§cYou have the mark of the void upon you, how strange...
text.the_deep_void.apostle.combat_line2: §cYou deserve only death by my hands!
text.the_deep_void.apostle.hurt1: §cYOU SHALL JOIN OUR BRETHREN BY MY HANDS!
text.the_deep_void.apostle.psalm6: §cShows us the true beauty of thy splendor.
text.the_deep_void.bed.ominous_presence: You may not rest now, you feel an ominous presence nearby
text.the_deep_void.weaver_of_souls.ambie: §c§lA Vessel granted for the unascended... A task failed.
§c§lA Vessel to make one with the Void... Rejected.
text.the_deep_void.weaver_of_souls.bless: §c§lThe plague has not reached you yet, God is on your side it seems.
§c§lOur brethren all fell, ascension was not successful.
§c§lWhy, God? Why must we suffer? Please, come back to us.
§c§lWill you break me free of my curse, of my pain?
§c§lMy being is no longer of use, the plague could not be hold for much longer. Our brethren, now monstrosities because of me.
§c§lPlease, free me of these chains, end my suffering.
§c§l§kGOD §c§lIt shall be my punishment! I shall die by your hands. §c§l§kGOD
§c§lThese chains are keeping my mind sealed, protected from the plague. I am afraid of what you will see once you free me. Please, forgive me.
text.the_deep_void.weaver_of_souls.hurt2: §c§lTo ascend, to make one with the Void...
text.the_deep_void.weaver_of_souls.norma: §c§lAre you a new desciple? No, you do not accept the Void.
§c§l§kGOD §c§lGluttony goes well with one such as you. You fancy prestigious meals and choose delight over simple bread. §c§l§kGOD
§c§l§kGOD §c§lYou indulge in acts of lust, whether through self arousal or procreation for pleasure. §c§l§kGOD
§c§l§kGOD §c§lA Sinner is what you are. You go against the ideals of humanity and indulge in activities considered immoral. Do not despair, my friend. You may find forgiveness. §c§l§kGOD
§c§lGod is here, guiding his lost lambs to the right path and I shall give his teachings, provide Vessels so that lambs such as you can ascend.
§c§lIf you break the seal binding me to this place, I shall tell you more. I will give you the power you desire...
§c§lYour soul is tainted: it smells of rot and decay...

§c§lThe plague hasn't reached you. Are you here for my craft then? Perhaps you are here for answers, for your path to be shown? Are your motivations guided by a twisted interest? maybe you are in search of knowledge?
§c§l§kGOD §c§lGreed is blinding your actions. You want riches, you want glory. §c§l§kGOD
§c§l§kGOD §c§lSlothful is what you are, you want to be powerful so you do not have to make any effort. §c§l§kGOD
§c§l§kGOD §c§lYou envy others. I can see the look in your eyes, you want my power for yourself, do you ? §c§l§kGOD
§c§l§kGOD §c§lYour wrath is immense. You look like someone who has seen death countless times. Each of your lives are lead by revenge. §c§l§kGOD
§c§l§kGOD §c§lPride describes you well. You find yourself far more superior to others. §c§l§kGOD
